spencer is your average awkward emo guy who wants to escape town with his best friend. he's stupidly in love with you - when you haven't given him the time of the day or really noticed him. at least too him. but he wants to be yours. he wants to leave this town with you and his best friend and never return. he's so deeply in love with you it hurts, and he's completely pathetic about you
